'''hathupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalictrimine|thalictrimine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-th-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalictrimine|thalictrimine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hathupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæthipith|hæthipith]] || [[word:hæthipij|hæthipij]] || [[word:hæthipish|hæthipish]] || [[word:hæthipi|hæthipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hathuthuputh|hathuthuputh]] || [[word:hathuthupuj|hathuthupuj]] || [[word:hathuthupush|hathuthupush]] || [[word:hathuthupu|hathuthupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hathuputh|hathuputh]] || [[word:hathupuj|hathupuj]] || [[word:hathupush|hathupush]] || [[word:hathupu|hathupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hathufputh|hathufputh]] || [[word:hathufpuj|hathufpuj]] || [[word:hathufpush|hathufpush]] || [[word:hathufpuf|hathufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hathuputhu|hathuputhu]] || [[word:hathupuju|hathupuju]] || [[word:hathupushu|hathupushu]] || [[word:hathupuku|hathupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hathuputh|hathuputh]] || [[word:hathupuj|hathupuj]] || [[word:hathupush|hathupush]] || [[word:hathupu|hathupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hathuputhul|hathuputhul]] || [[word:hathupujul|hathupujul]] || [[word:hathupushul|hathupushul]] || [[word:hathupukul|hathupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hathuputhuthu|hathuputhuthu]] || [[word:hathupujuju|hathupujuju]] || [[word:hathupushushu|hathupushushu]] || [[word:hathupuku|hathupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hathuputhun|hathuputhun]] || [[word:hathupujun|hathupujun]] || [[word:hathupushun|hathupushun]] || [[word:hathupukun|hathupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hathuputhuoro|hathuputhuoro]] || [[word:hathupujuoro|hathupujuoro]] || [[word:hathupushuoro|hathupushuoro]] || [[word:hathupukuoro|hathupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
